name: eldora-photon-beam
title: Photon Beam
author: Eldora UI
description: Renders a configurable field of curved Three.js light trails with bloom.

changes: Added caller class and style props, decorative semantics, finite numeric bounds, and a stable background fallback.
Converted signal advancement to frame-time-based movement and made reduced motion render one static frame.
Paused rendering outside the viewport and in hidden documents, observed container size, capped device pixel ratio, and completed WebGL resource cleanup.
Made the effect rebuild when visual props change and return a static fallback when WebGL renderer creation fails.

modifications.change: Added a caller-sized wrapper API, bounded inputs, frame-time movement, static reduced-motion rendering, visibility and viewport suspension, ResizeObserver sizing, defensive WebGL creation, and complete geometry/material/composer/context cleanup.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied high-cost visual effect responsive, bounded, motion-safe, and leak-free without changing its authored beam geometry or bloom treatment.
